item.title: 32 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 282
item.description:
A Japanese man, Toshiyuki Kuroki, spent two years planting thousands of fragrant pink flowers around his home to help his wife Yasuko after she lost her sight to diabetes and became depressed. Apparently, the clouds of scent and the visitors the flowers attracted helped bring her out of her shell.
~u/Difficult_Win_9904
I've been super sick lately and haven't been able to work. If you can help out, it would be appreciated: https://ko-fi.com/hoopsnek
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

26 Man Tax: Aaron Paul
"What wisdom, what warning can prevail against gladness? There is no law so strong that a little gladness may not transgress." - Henry David Thoreau So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.*
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: GovBrief Today #495
item.description: Juan Carlos Rodriguez Romero was driving to a DoorDash shift when an ICE agent shot at him, and the government charged him with assaulting its agents. That was four days before Christmas. DHS claimed he rammed federal vehicles, and prosecutors stacked felony charges carrying 20 years. The case survived more than five months, until five of the six agents on the scene contradicted the official story and the Justice Department quietly dropped it this week. He is not an outlier. The government's own watchdog reported that its largest detention camp destroyed evidence in a homicide and denied prisoners treatment for diabetes and HIV. The same day the watchdog's findings landed, the House voted by a margin of two to write a $70 billion check anyway, funding ICE and the Border Patrol through 2029. Nothing else in your government gets guaranteed funding for three years. The agency that shoots at delivery drivers and lies about it just did. I've emailed 7,753 stories over 495 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260609-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june9 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/butterfly-license [3] https://go.govbrief.today/hospital-warnings [4] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-eeoc [5] https://go.govbrief.today/romero-dropped [6] https://go.govbrief.today/vance-minnesota [7] https://go.govbrief.today/socsec-2032 [8] https://go.govbrief.today/gao-emontana [9] https://go.govbrief.today/clyde-carter-ross [10] https://go.govbrief.today/immigration-funding [11] https://go.govbrief.today/mace-loses [12] https://go.govbrief.today/house-union [13] https://go.govbrief.today/fcc-burners [14] https://go.govbrief.today/worldcup-ufc [15] https://go.govbrief.today/nitrogen-halted Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Fight Christofascism
item.description: They call themselves "Christian nationalists". The second word is key. They have reduced "Christian" from a standalone noun to an adjective. Their preachers are frauds who use their followers to fund a lavish lifestyle by telling them that they can have it, too – if they do what they're told to do, think what they're told to think, and believe what they're told to believe. "Christian" nationalism is a cult well on the way to becoming a terrorist organization. That's not an extreme thing to say. Look at how many of them advocate violence "in the name of God". Then look at how many have actually committed violence already.
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Sen. Ossoff on Republicans letting ACA tax credits expire: "In the last five months in Georgia, more than 300,000 people have lost their insurance altogether."
item.dc:creator: MEOWnews
